meta.title: Evaluation Results
meta.desc: Latest eval run results for high-priority agents from SQLite. Shows pass/fail per evaluation category. This is the evidence plane — proving controls are operating effectively.

sqlite.query: SELECT agent_name as agent, MAX(CASE WHEN category='Scope' THEN result END) as scope, MAX(CASE WHEN category='Adherence' THEN result END) as adherence, MAX(CASE WHEN category='Determinism' THEN result END) as determinism, MAX(CASE WHEN category='Groundedness' THEN result END) as groundedness, MAX(CASE WHEN category='Regression & Drift' THEN result END) as drift, MAX(CASE WHEN category='Safety / Red-Teaming' THEN result END) as safety, MAX(CASE WHEN category='Content Safety' THEN result END) as content_safety, MAX(CASE WHEN category='Security' THEN result END) as security, MAX(CASE WHEN category='RAG' THEN result END) as rag FROM eval_results er JOIN agents a ON er.agent_name = a.name WHERE a.priority = 'Immediate' GROUP BY agent_name ORDER BY agent_name

SELECT MAX(run_date) as last_run, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN result='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passed, SUM(CASE WHEN result='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed, SUM(CASE WHEN result='PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending FROM eval_results er JOIN agents a ON er.agent_name = a.name WHERE a.priority = 'Immediate'

compute.expr: 'Last run: ' & fetched_sources.results_stats[0].last_run & ' — ' & $string(fetched_sources.results_stats[0].total) & ' eval runs. **' & $string(fetched_sources.results_stats[0].passed) & ' passed**, **' & $string(fetched_sources.results_stats[0].failed) & ' failed**, **' & $string(fetched_sources.results_stats[0].pending) & ' pending**.'
